changelog:
🎵 Import Playlists from Spotify & YouTube
• Paste public Spotify or YouTube URLs to import tracks instantly
• Resolves real high-quality album artwork concurrently via Spotify oEmbed API

🎨 Theme Builder & Custom Styling (Discord Style)
• Added a full-featured Custom Theme Builder to Appearance settings!
• Customize Accent colors, panel glass transparency levels, and glass blurs
• Set custom background images (paste any link) showing beautifully under glass cards
• Native QuickCSS Editor allowing you to write your own stylesheet rules in real-time!

✨ Live Animated Wallpapers
• Three gorgeous responsive live background wallpapers (Aurora Drift, Starry Space, Retro Grid)
• Glassmorphic translucent panel overlays for all sidebars and player bars

🔧 Stability & Bug Fixes
• Included preload.js whitelisting in distribution package
• Fixed tab navigation crash and dynamic playlist row caching
• Installer now runs completely silently and auto-launches the new app when finished!
